description_long: This radiator features a tall, narrow rectangular form with five evenly spaced vertical columns running the full height of the unit. The top and bottom ends are capped with horizontal bars that connect the columns, providing structural integrity and a clean, linear appearance. The columns are slightly rounded, giving the radiator a modern, minimalist look suitable for urban interiors or exteriors. Small protrusions at the base suggest connection points for plumbing, likely for water or steam circulation. The surface appears to be made of metal, likely steel or cast iron, with a matte dark finish. There are no visible control valves or decorative grilles, emphasizing a utilitarian and functional design.
description: A tall, narrow radiator with five vertical columns and a matte dark metal finish, featuring simple horizontal end bars and minimal detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing five vertical columns and horizontal end bars, with visible connection points at the base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the radiator's slim profile and the depth of the columns, with minimal surface detail.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the same vertical columns and end bars, with base protrusions visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow depth and clean lines of the radiator.
attribute_pipe_connections: two connection points at the bottom, one at each end, oriented horizontally
